I organise the Statistics and Probability seminars at Nottingham Maths. Below is the list of upcoming talks in the seminar series.

Autumn 2023

  • 7 September 2023, 2pm. Antar Bandyopadhyay, Indian Statistical Institute (ISI), Delhi Centre.
    • Title: TBA
  • 5 October 2023, 2pm. Codina Cotar, University College London.
    • Title: TBA
  • 12 October 2023, 2pm. Minmin Wang, University of Sussex.
    • Title: TBA
  • 19 October 2023, 2pm. Ruth Keogh, London School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine.
    • Title: TBA
  • 16 November 2023, 2pm. Daniel Clarkson, University of Lancaster.
    • Title: TBA
  • 30 November 2023, 2pm. Sarah Heaps, Durham University.
    • Title: TBA

Spring 2024

You can find past seminars here: Spring 2023 Autumn 2022
